A.error_quality: free - custom BankAccountError with descriptive messages; no error needed (pass@1).
A.notes: Invariant enforcement = AI hand-written defensive checks. No type/contract guarantee. _validate_amount rejects non-int/bool and <=0 by raising; withdraw raises before mutating when amount>balance. State mutated only after all checks pass, so balance never goes <0 and is unchanged on error.
A.toolchain_notes: docker run --rm -v <repo>:/bench -w .../Python/A ai-lang-bench python3 run_tests.py ; Python 3.13.5.
